contentList.content: You are a seasoned veteran, using your might and a variety of overpowering attacks to strike your opponents down.
You learn new ways to deal colossal blows to your enemies. Each can be used once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Turn a miss on a melee weapon <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag> into a hit.

Smash through a creature's defences, reducing its <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> by 5 until the end of your turn. If it fails a <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>, the reduction lasts until the end of your next turn instead.
Prepare to sweep through your foes. Your next 2 melee Arms Strikes can target 1 additional creature within range.
Your melee Arms Strikes can target 1 additional creature within range.
Swing your weapon in a wide arc, striking up to [1] creatures in front of you.
Strike a creature and inflict <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MORTAL_WOUNDS">Mortal Wounds</LSTag>, preventing it from regaining <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag>.
Deal a mighty blow that consumes all your available attacks for this action.

Deals weapon damage once, or twice if you have <LSTag Type="Passive" Tooltip="ExtraAttack">Extra Attack</LSTag> or thrice if you have <LSTag Type="Passive" Tooltip="ExtraAttack_2">Improved Extra Attack</LSTag>.
